Tests if the prototype of a new Number object is Number.prototype.

# Purpose
This code is a simple assertion that checks the prototype chain of a `Number` object in JavaScript. It verifies that the prototype of a newly created `Number` object is `Number.prototype`. This assertion ensures that the JavaScript environment correctly implements the prototype inheritance for `Number` objects, which is a fundamental aspect of JavaScript's object-oriented features. The code provides narrow functionality, focusing specifically on validating the prototype relationship for `Number` objects.
